name: rss-mcp
dockerfile:
FROM node:20-slim

# Install MCP server package globally
RUN npm install -g rss-mcp

# The rss-mcp package binary (dist/index.js) lacks a shebang line.
# When executed directly, the shell interprets 'import' (first word) as a command,
# which resolves to ImageMagick's 'import' tool instead of running Node.js.
# Solution: Use 'node' explicitly to run the file.
ENTRYPOINT ["node", "/usr/local/lib/node_modules/rss-mcp/dist/index.js"]
description: MCP RSS Server - Fetch and parse RSS feeds using rss-mcp npm package. Fixed to work around missing shebang in package binary that causes ImageMagick 'import' command to be executed instead.
